Wednesday, Jun 3 · 3:30 PM to 7:00 PM CEST

Sundtkvartalet

Lakkegata 53 · Oslo

How to find us
Oslo dbt meetup June 2026

Hosted by Trøyel and Runar A.

Oslo dbt Meetup
4.7
93 reviews
Details

Welcome to dbt Oslo's 11th Meetup!

What are dbt meetups?
dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

🤝 Organizer: Glitni's Trøyel and Runar
🏠 Venue Host: 🆕 Glitni, Sundtkvartalet (entrance next to Vintage Kitchen)

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

📝 Meetup Agenda:

15:30: Meet and greet with the dbt Oslo community, served pizza and bar
15:45: Welcome and introductions, Runar and Trøyel (Glitni)
Whats new in dbt?
16:00: "From AI-project to end-to-end data pipeline in dbt", Noman Bashir (Data Scientist, Telenor), Anton Lindahl (Data Engineer, Glitni)
16:45: Break
17:00: "Bulders data journey: Data platform from scratch to AI ready with modern tooling" Thomas Eide Jebsen (Head of Data Science, Bulder)
Join the dbt Slack community: https://community.getdbt.com/

🇳🇴Join the conversation in the #local-norway channel in dbt Slack to connect with other data practitioners locally.

----------------------------------
dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 40,000 organizations worldwide. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

events.page_title: Community AMA with Erica Louie (dbt Labs), Thu, Nov 21, 2024, 8:00 PM | Meetup
events.raw_text:
Skip to content

Thu, Nov 21, 2024 · 8:00 PM to 9:00 PM CET

Online event

This event has passed

Community AMA with Erica Louie (dbt Labs)
Network event

99 attendees from 54 groups hosting

D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Oslo dbt Meetup
4.7
93 reviews
Details

REGISTER HERE 👉 https://www.getdbt.com/resources/webinars/community-slack-ama

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Erica Louie, Data @ dbt Labs
Host: Bolaji Oyejide, Digital Community Mgr @ dbt Labs
Topic: Careers in data, building a data team, the dbt Semantic Layer, and scaling your dbt project
When: November 21st @ 2pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Erica was the second employee at dbt Labs, then called Fishtown Analytics and she's seen dbt grow, a lot. In this AMA, Erica will share more on her career in data, her strong opinions on building a data team, how she manages her team, the dbt Semantic Layer, scaling your dbt project, and more on her Substack.

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-ama channel in Slack to participate live!

Read more
Speaker
Erica Louie, dbt Labs

Second hire at dbt Labs, former Head of Data, and now leading the product data team (and previously worked for BuzzFeed's data team), Erica "ric" Louie proudly hails from a liberal arts background (studied political science + italian) and grew her career in data at dbt Labs starting from the ground-up. She firmly believes that anyone can be a data practitioner with the right mentors, resources (sans trivial data jargon), and a good sense of humor. While rethinking the philosophy behind data systems, operations, and teams is one of her favorite topics, she enjoys thinking and writing about the human experience, and how it intersects with the work we choose to do and who we choose to do it with.

Tue, Sep 24, 2024 · 1:00 PM to 4:00 PM CEST

Telenor

Snarøyveien 30, Fornebu · Oslo

How to find us
Oslo dbt Meetup

Hosted by Anders E.

Oslo dbt Meetup
4.7
93 reviews
Details

Welcome to the 2024 fall Oslo dbt meetup.

Just as the sun disappears for winter we will try to brighten the day with a new meetup for dbt enthusiast!

We are trying to host it during working hours this time, to see how that pans out. This time the meetup will also be hosted in the outskirts of Oslo, at Telenors premises on Fornebu.

To get to Fornebu, a good option is to take the train to Lysaker, and then change to a bus (or walk) to Telenor.
The bus-stop is Telenor Fornebu or Fornebuparken
Google maps directions:
[https://maps.app.goo.gl/DH25DThAe7s4mdw3A](https://eur02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmaps.app.goo.gl%2FDH25DThAe7s4mdw3A&data=05%7C02%7Canders.elton%40telenor.no%7Cfa37adac9ea04b99f63708dcd7012ee8%7C1676489c5c7246b7ba639ab90c4aad44%7C1%7C0%7C638621647277886047%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=yDkJcZjIC7%2BXzJ%2FmOAqFJQA4hk1yWy8r87BRBDU6jzc%3D&reserved=0 "https://eur02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmaps.app.goo.gl%2FDH25DThAe7s4mdw3A&data=05%7C02%7Canders.elton%40telenor.no%7Cfa37adac9ea04b99f63708dcd7012ee8%7C1676489c5c7246b7ba639ab90c4aad44%7C1%7C0%7C638621647277886047%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=yDkJcZjIC7%2BXzJ%2FmOAqFJQA4hk1yWy8r87BRBDU6jzc%3D&reserved=0")
Telenor Expo is the location we are hosting the meetup in. Visitors do not need to register
UPDATE: The auditorium is "The voice", - it is located in the basement!
Take the rightmost entrance to get into Expo, not the one on the left side!

Guests can use the parking house (Snarøyveien 30)
Parking prices you can find here: Norwegian Property Fornebu | Onepark

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

Agenda
13:00 - 13:30 - Mingling and food
13:30 - 13:40 - Welcome by Anders
13:40 - 14:10 - How Telenor is adapting DataOps through dbt by Keunsoo Park (TELENOR)
14:15 - 14:45 - Data spaghetti to data buffet - How we use dbt at Nav to make data more flexible and user friendly while improving DX. Caroline Winther and Brynjar Morka Mæhlum (NAV)
14:50 - 15:20 - A new approach to dbt testing & observability with Data Products. Petr Janda (SYNC)
15:20-16:00 - Networking

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-norway channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).

Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Thu, Jun 6, 2024 · 4:30 PM to 7:15 PM CEST

Rebel

Universitetsgata 2 · Oslo

Oslo dbt meetup June 2024
R

Hosted by Runar A. and Trøyel

Oslo dbt Meetup
4.7
93 reviews
Details

Welcome to dbt Oslo's sixth Meetup!

This dbt Meetup is an opportunity for the local Oslo dbt Community to connect and collaborate. If you work with data, this event is for you. We welcome data analysts, scientists, engineers, architects, and more!

The goal of these meetups are to grow the community around dbt and share knowledge on how it is being used and the surrounding architectures.

Glitni is sponsoring this in person event as a dbt partner and Rebel is providing the meetup venue.

Meetup agenda:

16:30: Meet and greet with the dbt oslo community, served pizza and bar
17:00: Welcome and introductions, Runar and Trøyel (Glitni)
17:15: How Slim CI/CD increases productivity and robustness, Sigve Svenkerud (Data Engineer, Norges Bank Investment Management)
18:00: Break
18:15 dbt 1.8 roundup and following Q&A with Kshitij Aranke (Senior Software Engineer, dbt Core / dbt Labs)
19:00: Outtro + Survey
19:15: Post-meetup drinks at Skråplanet / terrace outside event (depending on weather)

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://community.getdbt.com/

Welcome to the first dbt meetup of the year in Oslo!

This dbt Meetup is an opportunity for the local Oslo dbt Community to connect and collaborate. If you work with data, this event is for you. We welcome data analysts, scientists, engineers, architects, and more!
➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://community.getdbt.com/
🇳🇴Join the conversation in the #local-norway channel in dbt Slack to connect with other data practitioners locally.
dbt™ is a SQL-first transformation workflow that lets teams quickly and collaboratively deploy analytics code following software engineering best practices like modularity, portability, CI/CD, and documentation.
dbt has rapidly taken the market for data transformation and is widely used in modern data stacks.
The goal of these meetups are to grow the community around dbt and share knowledge on how it is being used and the surrounding architectures.

Amedia is sponsoring this in person event with venue, food and drinks!

Agenda:
17:00: Meet and greet + pizza and bar
17:45: Introduction of agenda and, speakers, by Anders
17:50: Welcome by Amedia
18:00: parallel dbt runs at scale - Lars Haugseth / Amedia
18:30: Design mental models for large-scale dbt projects - Ed Orozco / Sync
19:00 Data contracts and versioning - Nikita Barskov / Völur
19:30: Outtro + Survey
20:00: Post-meetup drinks on Luna bar

To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb

Welcome to dbt Oslo's fourth Meetup!

The agenda is in progress. But there will be discussions on the dbt roadmap and news from Coalesce in addition to showcases of dbt user experiences.

This dbt Meetup is an opportunity for the local Oslo dbt Community to connect and collaborate. If you work with data, this event is for you. We welcome data analysts, scientists, engineers, architects, and more!

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://community.getdbt.com/
🇳🇴Join the conversation in the #local-norway channel in dbt Slack to connect with other data practitioners locally.

dbt™ is a SQL-first transformation workflow that lets teams quickly and collaboratively deploy analytics code following software engineering best practices like modularity, portability, CI/CD, and documentation.

dbt has rapidly taken the market for data transformation and is widely used in modern data stacks.

The goal of these meetups are to grow the community around dbt and share knowledge on how it is being used and the surrounding architectures.

Glitni is sponsoring this in person event as a dbt partner and Rebel is providing the meetup venue.

Agenda:
17:00: Meet and greet + pizza and bar
Meet and greet, attendance and assortment of pizzas will be served from 17:00. There will also be a bar available for buying drinks.
17:30: Welcome
1735: Features, updates and news from Coalesce (Ernesto Ongaro, dbt Labs)
18:00: Break- bar and pizza available
18:20: Parallel sessions
- Build trust with the power of dbt testing (Tim Laser, Data Engineer @ Favrit AS)
- How to get going with dbt in practice (introductory/intermediate) (Runar Alvseike, Data Engineer @ Glitni)
18:50: Outtro + Survey
19:00: Post-meetup drinks outside the venue

To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://community.getdbt.com/

dbt has rapidly taken the market for data transformation and is widely used in modern data stacks.

The goal of these meetups are to grow the community around dbt and share knowledge on how it is being used and the surrounding architectures.

Wed, Mar 22, 2023 · 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM CET

Computashuset

Akersgata 35 · Oslo

How to find us
Oslo dbt Meetup

Hosted by Anders E. and Oda Scheen K.

Oslo dbt Meetup
4.7
93 reviews
Details

Oslo dbt Meetup has its first meetup.

dbt has rapidly taken the market for data transformation and is widely used in modern data stacks.

The goal is to grow the community around dbt and share knowledge on how it is beeing used and the surrounding architectures.
Computas is sponsoring this event as a dbt partner, and we are being allowed to use their premises for this first event.

Note that we have set the core event time from 18:20 - if you are here during that time you will get all the talks

All talks will be in English.

Agenda
17:30-18:15 - Meet and greet + food and beverages.
Doors open at 1730, and if you want to eat in peace, please show during this time slot not to disturb the talks too much.

18:15-18:30 - About this Meetup [Anders Elton] - English

18:30-19:00 - dbt used in a data mesh setup. Experiences from Elvia - [Anders Elton]
Will talk about how dbt enterprise is being used as a collaboration tool to empower a data mesh. Process automation like CICD, scheduling and how we use dbt hooks to register dataproducts in our data catalog.

19:00-19:30 - Break and networking

19:30-20:00 - dbt Experiences - Coop Norway - [Takaaki Yoshikawa]
Will talk about 3 projects: Feature store, simplify transaction data, refactoring dashboard data sources. There will be elements from what I enjoyed from the projects like dbt-utils, post-hook etc.

20:00-20:50 - Networking & beverages.
Open discussions on what we want from this group going forward.

To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb
